evidence: Completed Baguette farm docs plan. Added docs/baguette-farm.md; linked from getting-started, agent playbook, skill, runtime reference, commands, integrations, architecture, repo-strategy, session handoff, and known limitations; package whitelist includes the doc; contract tests cover package inclusion and proof boundary. Verification passed: Baguette upstream/local probes, contracts 11/11, smoke:package, npm test 115/115, doctor, diff check, pack dry-run. Independent code-reviewer APPROVE and architect CLEAR. Sidecars found by cleanup dry-run but not deleted.

codexGoal.objective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goal.objective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aiSlopCleaner.evidence: Scoped ai-slop-cleaner pass on changed docs/tests/package files. Behavior locked by node --test tests/contracts.test.mjs and npm run --silent smoke:package before cleanup; fallback/slop scan found no masking fallback edits. One optional wording tightening tied farm UI affordances to upstream README plus served farm assets.

commands: baguette serve --port 18421 with curl probes for /farm and /simulators.json
verification.evidence: Baguette help confirmed serve --port/--host defaults. Temporary server probe returned /farm 200, /simulators.json 200 with running/available arrays, per-device focus page 200, and definition.json 200. contracts.test passed 11/11, smoke:package passed, npm test passed 115/115, doctor passed, git diff --check passed, pack dry-run included docs/baguette-farm.md and excluded .omx. Cleanup dry-run found 25 sidecars; none deleted by policy.

codeReview.evidence: Independent code-reviewer approved the scoped docs/contracts/package diff with no findings. Independent architect returned CLEAR and the optional strictness note was addressed by tying farm UI affordances to upstream README plus served assets.

codeReviewer.evidence: APPROVE: docs/baguette-farm.md clearly states farm is not Screenslop proof; docs/commands.md says no --open-farm; package.json includes docs/baguette-farm.md; tests/contracts.test.mjs covers package inclusion and proof boundary; docs/roadmap.md has no diff.

architect.evidence: CLEAR: Baguette farm stays upstream/operator lane, Studio remains a private wrapper over the public engine, command surface does not overclaim, skill/runtime docs align, and docs/roadmap.md is untouched.
